## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / enhancement
- [ ] Refactor / internal improvement

## Testing

<!-- How was this validated? Examples:
     - "Ran backend unit tests: npm test — all pass"
     - "Manually tested wallet connection flow in demo mode"
     - "Verified migration dry-run on SQLite and Postgres" -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`cd backend && npm test && cd ../frontend && npm test`)
- [ ] All commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] Changelog updated if this is a user-facing change (`npm run changelog:update`)
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior has changed
